micro-mind is a Claude Code-style interactive development REPL powered by `qwen25-1.5b-instruct` via `llama-server`. It offers seven tool surfaces: read_file, list_dir, list_files_recursive, grep, write_file, edit_file, and bash. The harness ensures determinism across canonical workflows with 30/30 unit tests passing.
